one_time_description: Equity gain from First Nation business enterprises (Mitawbik Ventures Limited Partnership) including reversal of prior impairment provision and recognition of other income of $1,403,123
economic_notes: Mitawbik Ventures Inc. and Mitawbik Ventures Limited Partnership engaged in leasing of plastics moulding equipment. Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership (OFNLP) reserve fund of $1,018,472. COVID-19 pandemic impacts noted.
notes: Fiscal year is 2022 (year ended March 31, 2022). Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Mitawbik Ventures Inc. (100% owned general partner) and Mitawbik Ventures Limited Partnership (99% direct interest). Large one-time equity gain of $901,890 from MVLP including reversal of $644,230 impairment provision and $1,403,123 other income. No schedule of remuneration disclosed. No long-term debt on balance sheet. Current liabilities not separately broken out in provided text. KEB (Kinoomaadziwin Education Body) funding treated as non-government transfer revenue. Total government transfers calculated as Provincial ($748,419) + Federal ISC ($2,805,375) = $3,553,794. OSR = $8,130,825 - $3,553,794 = $4,577,031 (includes KEB, marina, rental, investment, other, equity gain).
